overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The scene transitions from a construction zone beneath an elevated highway to a residential street lined with palm trees, modest houses, and massive holographic billboards, with flying vehicles visible in the sky.

events.description: pedestrian in american flag shirt passes close to camera on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the construction zone beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing american flag shirt walking toward camera

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway with green support beams
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the elevated highway
orange and white striped plastic barriers lining the sidewalk
construction equipment visible in the distance behind fencing

segments.scene_description: Walking through a construction zone beneath an elevated highway, passing concrete pillars and orange barriers. The space is partially covered by the overhead structure, creating diffused lighting. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions on the narrow sidewalk.

events.description: exiting construction zone and crossing into residential area
crossing the asphalt road at the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street from the construction zone toward the residential sidewalk

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light on metal pole
multi-lane asphalt street with crosswalk markings
row of modest single-family homes with porches
large circular holographic advertisement with 24/7 text and japanese characters

segments.scene_description: Approaching a traffic light and crossing the open asphalt street from the construction zone into a residential area. The elevated highway recedes behind as the character steps into full sunlight and crosses toward the sidewalk lined with houses.

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead in the sky
slight turn to examine blue house on the right

agents.ego_description: walking down the residential sidewalk passing palm trees and modest houses

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk between the street and houses
large green metal dumpster with graffiti on the side
two-story blue wooden house with weathered paint and porch
scattered garbage bags and debris next to the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a residential sidewalk lined with palm trees and modest houses, with massive holographic billboards and futuristic towers visible in the background. The environment shows signs of urban decay with trash piles and overgrown weeds. A flying vehicle passes overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential area with mixed housing and commercial elements

events.description: turning to explore side areas and examine building details
flying vehicle hovers overhead near the street

agents.ego_description: exploring the residential area, turning to view different angles of the street, houses, and passing vehicles

entered.detail: single-story yellow house with porch and wooden fence
low-rise commercial structure with signage and metal roofing
wooden utility poles with multiple transformers and wires

segments.scene_description: Exploring the residential area more closely, turning to examine a yellow house and nearby commercial buildings. The camera pans to show street-level details including utility poles, parked cars, and passing flying vehicles. The environment mixes residential homes with commercial structures and futuristic urban elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed industrial construction zone into a sun-drenched residential district of a futuristic city. It begins beneath an elevated highway, moving past concrete pillars and orange barriers under diffused lighting while navigating a narrow sidewalk crowded with pedestrians. As the camera approaches a traffic light, the overhead structure recedes and the scene opens into full sunlight while crossing an asphalt street. The environment then shifts to a residential sidewalk lined with palm trees and modest houses, where signs of urban decay and overgrown weeds contrast with massive holographic billboards and a flying vehicle passing overhead. Finally, the camera turns to examine the details of a yellow house and nearby commercial buildings, panning across utility poles and parked cars as more futuristic vehicles glide through the sky.
